zh.lifeSummary: 當Marmaduke de Thweng於1248年出生在英國越可爾吉爾頓時，他的父親Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle24歲，母親Lucy de Brus22歲。他於1273年與Isabel de Ros在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1323年4月23日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特吉爾頓享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭克利夫蘭吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marmaduke de Thweng于1248年出生在英国越可爾吉爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle24岁，母亲Lucy de Brus22岁。他于1273年与Isabel de Ros在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1323年4月23日在英国英格兰薩默塞特吉爾頓享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰克利夫蘭吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Marmaduke de Thweng was born in 1248, in Kilton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, was 24 and his mother, Lucy de Brus, was 22. He married Isabel de Ros in 1273, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 April 1323, in Kilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Guisborough, Cleveland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marmaduke de Thweng est né en 1248, à Kilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Brus, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Ros en 1273, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1323, à Kilton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Cleveland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: Castleton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Marmaduke de Thweng 1248 in Kilton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle 24 und seine Mutter Lucy de Brus 22. Er hat 1273 in Yorkshire, England Isabel de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1323 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Kilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Guisborough, Cleveland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Isabel de Ros nel 1273, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1323, nel Kilton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Cleveland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marmaduke de Thwengが1248年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castleは24歳，母Lucy de Brusは22歳であった。1273年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでIsabel de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1323年4月23日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトキルトンで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクレベランドグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marmaduke de Thweng(이)가 1248년 영국 요르크실르 킬턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Brus(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1273년 영국 요르크실르에서 Isabel de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1323년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 킬턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 클레벨랜드 길스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke de Thweng nasceu em 1248, em Kilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Brus, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Ros em 1273, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1323, em Kilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Cleveland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marmaduke de Thweng родился в 1248 г. в местности килтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Brus, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Ros в 1273 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 апреля 1323 г. в местности килтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, кливеланд, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabel de Ros en 1273, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1323, en Kilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Cleveland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
